name: Mirabela Nickel Ltd
description: Mirabela Nickel Limited was a mineral exploration and mining company primarily focused on the development and operation of the Santa Rita nickel sulphide mine in Bahia, Brazil. Once one of the world's largest open-pit nickel sulphide operations, the company was listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: MBN) and the Toronto Stock Exchange. Following significant financial challenges and operational difficulties, the company entered into voluntary administration and subsequent liquidation, leading to its eventual delisting from the stock exchanges. Its primary assets were located in Brazil, while its corporate headquarters were based in Perth, Australia.
